zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leighton於1426年出生在英國史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓時，他的父親Richard Leighton14歲，母親Joan Joyce Cornwall12歲。他和Ankaret Burgh至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1493年2月4日在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leighton于1426年出生在英国史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓时，他的父亲Richard Leighton14岁，母亲Joan Joyce Cornwall12岁。他和Ankaret Burgh至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1493年2月4日在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leighton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Slayton
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Leighton (compare Layton ) with the addition of initial S-. Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Sladen or of Sleightholme, principally a habitational name from Sleightholme Dale in Kirkbymoorside, but perhaps occasionally from Sleightholme in Bowes or the lost Sleightholme in Lythe. The placenames derive from Old Norse sléttr ‘smooth, level’ + holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is now very rare in Britain. Compare Slaydon .

variants.name: Laughton
meanings: habitational name from Laughton en le Morthen in Yorkshire, Laughton in Leicestershire or any of the two places called Laughton in Lincolnshire (one near Gainsborough and another near Folkingham). The places are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, meaning ‘village or farm where leeks are grown’. It may sometimes have alternated with Leighton , which is mostly from placenames with the same etymology.

variants.name: Letton
meanings: English: habitational name, most probably from Letton in Norfolk or Latton in Essex. It could also be a variant of Leighton or Laughton . Most of the places so named have the same etymology as Letton and Latton, i.e. ‘farm where leeks are grown’ (Old English lēac-tūn). Another possibility is that it is a variant of Latten .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Leighton was born in 1426, in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Leighton, was 14 and his mother, Joan Joyce Cornwall, was 12. He had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Ankaret Burgh. He died on 4 February 1493, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leighton est né en 1426, à Church Stretton, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Leighton, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Joan Joyce Cornwall, avait 12 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Ankaret Burgh. Il est décédé le 4 février 1493, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leighton 1426 in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Leighton 14 und seine Mutter Joan Joyce Cornwall 12. Er hatte mit Ankaret Burgh mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1493 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leighton è nato il nel 1426 nel Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Leighton, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Joan Joyce Cornwall, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Ankaret Burgh. Morì il 4 febbraio 1493, nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leightonが1426年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンで生まれた時，父Richard Leightonは14歳，母Joan Joyce Cornwallは12歳であった。彼はAnkaret Burghとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1493年2月4日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Leighton(이)가 1426년 영국 슈럽실르 c후르치 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Leighton(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Joyce Cornwall(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Ankaret Burgh(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 2월 4일 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leighton nasceu em 1426, em Church Stretton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Leighton, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Joan Joyce Cornwall, tinha 12 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Ankaret Burgh. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1493, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leighton родился в 1426 г. в местности чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Leighton было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Joyce Cornwall, 12. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Ankaret Burgh. Он умер 4 февраля 1493 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leighton nació en 1426, en Church Stretton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Leighton, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Joan Joyce Cornwall, tenía 12 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Ankaret Burgh. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1493, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
